decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay utilizing the powerful partners Kraum and Yoshimaru in a WUR color combination. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent while controlling the board with a mix of creatures, spells, and enchantments. It includes a variety of removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Swords to Plowshares to deal with threats, as well as disruptive creatures like Drannith Magistrate and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben to slow down the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes cards for card advantage like Skullclamp and powerful finishers like Fiery Confluence and Sundering Eruption to secure the win. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and disrupt the opponent's strategy to come out victorious in a one-on-one duel.

This deck aims to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of disruptive spells, removal, and powerful creatures. It leverages Ketramose, the New Dawn's abilities to apply pressure on the opponent while also protecting its own board presence. The deck includes a variety of removal spells like Fatal Push, Swords to Plowshares, and Toxic Deluge to deal with threats, as well as disruptive cards like Thoughtseize, Hymn to Tourach, and Opposition Agent to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck includes powerful creatures like Skyclave Apparition and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to further pressure the opponent and maintain board control.

The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a combination of efficient creatures, removal spells, and disruptive counterspells. Aragorn, King of Gondor, leads the charge with other powerful creatures like Aang, Swift Savior and True-Name Nemesis. The deck includes a mix of burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lightning Helix to deal direct damage to the opponent and control spells like Force of Negation and Mana Leak to disrupt their game plan. The deck is well-rounded with a mana base that supports a variety of colors and includes lands that provide card advantage and protection. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and efficiently while keeping the opponent on the defensive.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The commander, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, allows for additional value by proliferating different types of counters on permanents. With a mix of powerful control cards like Cryptic Command, Supreme Verdict, and Force of Negation, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies while maintaining card advantage. The inclusion of tutors like Demonic Tutor and Enlightened Tutor helps to find key pieces necessary for controlling the game. Overall, the goal of this deck is to outlast opponents through disruption and attrition, ultimately gaining a strong advantage and winning the game.

The deck revolves around utilizing aggressive creatures and equipment to overwhelm the opponent through a mix of combat damage and disruptive spells. Cloud, Midgar Mercenary serves as the commander, providing a powerful aggro threat backed up by cards like Flickerwisp, Mirrex, and Shadowspear to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes various hatebears like Thalia, Heretic Cathar and Drannith Magistrate to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Equipment such as Sword of Feast and Famine and Umezawa's Jitte provide additional damage and utility options, while cards like Cataclysm and Armageddon can reset the board in the player's favor. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish a dominant board presence and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck revolves around utilizing Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice as the commander to create a powerful enchantment-based combo strategy. The deck includes a wide range of enchantments and auras that can buff creatures, protect them, and generate value. It also includes creatures with powerful abilities and protection spells to ensure the combo pieces remain on the battlefield. The deck aims to create a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and enchantments. By utilizing Light-Paws' abilities and synergies between enchantments, auras, and creatures, the deck seeks to create a powerful and resilient combo engine to outvalue and outpace the opponent in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format.

The deck revolves around utilizing the aggressive nature of Spider-Man 2099 as the commander to quickly overwhelm opponents in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format. The deck includes a range of efficient removal spells, countermagic, and card draw to control the game while deploying threats like Malcolm, Alluring Scoundrel and Murktide Regent to apply pressure. The mana base is carefully crafted to support the deck's color requirements and to ensure consistency in casting spells. With a mix of burn spells, disruptive creatures, and versatile instants, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and close out the game swiftly with evasive threats and direct damage.

The deck focuses on utilizing Toph, Greatest Earthbender as the commander to create a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck includes multiple mana dorks like Arbor Elf and Birds of Paradise to ramp quickly and play powerful threats like Questing Beast and Surrak, Elusive Hunter early on. It also includes removal like Lightning Bolt and Pyrokinesis to deal with opposing threats efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Earthbender Ascension and Bumi, Unleashed showcases the theme of utilizing the power of earthbending to overwhelm opponents. The deck aims to apply pressure early, disrupt opponent's strategies, and close out the game quickly with powerful creatures and spells.
